name: Suspicious Digital Signature Of AppX Package
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Digital Signature Of AppX Package
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of AppX packages with known suspicious or malicious signature

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=157 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cn=foresee consulting inc., o=foresee consulting inc., l=north york, s=ontario, c=ca, serialnumber=1004913-1, oid.1.3.6.1.4.1.311.60.2.1.3=ca, oid.2.5.4.15=private organization%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Digital Signature Of AppX Package on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=157 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cn=foresee consulting inc., o=foresee consulting inc., l=north york, s=ontario, c=ca, serialnumber=1004913-1, oid.1.3.6.1.4.1.311.60.2.1.3=ca, oid.2.5.4.15=private organization%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Digital Signature Of AppX Package
